summary: The diff addresses REQ-15 and REQ-16 with clear implementations: PressKitPage now reads all text content from useGetContent and passes it to child components, and PasswordGateModal is rewritten to use the anonymous actor directly. However, REQ-14 (fixing the 'Unverified origin' II login error via derivationOrigin/II URL configuration) shows no evidence of being addressed — AdminDashboard.tsx was modified but only shows login() called without arguments with no derivationOrigin or II provider URL configuration changes visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the 'Unverified origin' error on /admin by ensuring the correct II URL (https://identity.ic0.app) and derivationOrigin (deployed frontend canister URL) are configured in the InternetIdentityProvider.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows AdminDashboard.tsx was modified and login() is called without arguments, but there is no evidence of InternetIdentityProvider configuration changes setting derivationOrigin or the II provider URL to https://identity.ic0.app. The frontend-file-summaries.txt only mentions 'login() is called without arguments (fixing the TS2554 error)' with no mention of derivationOrigin or II URL fixes. No derivationOrigin fix is evidenced anywhere in the diff.
